客家汉字: 阿聾打屁——冇聲冇氣
Hakka Pronunciation: a1 lung1 da3 pi4 – mau2 sang1 mau2 hi4
Chinese definition: 聾子放屁自己聽不到聲音。“冇聲冇氣”也指沒有消息、音訊，語帶雙關。
English Definition: A deaf person farts – no sound, no air. Describes total silence or no news whatsoever. 冇聲冇氣 is a pun meaning both 'no sound from a fart' and 'no word, no news'.

客家汉字: 伯公打屁——神氣
Hakka Pronunciation: bak5 gung1 da3 pi4 – sin2 hi4
Chinese definition: 伯公是客家人的土地神，通常安放在大榕樹下。放的屁當然是“神氣”了。
English Definition: The earth god 伯公 farts – divine gas / divine airs. 神氣 puns on 'gas from a deity' and 'arrogant/cocky'. Describes someone acting high and mighty.

客家汉字: 自己扛湯——自己啜
Hakka Pronunciation: cu4 gi3 gong1 tong1 – cu4 gi3 sot5
Chinese definition: sŏt （啜）是吸吮進嘴巴的意思。但也跟讚美的“說”同音。笑人自己讚美自己。
English Definition: Carrying your own soup – you drink it yourself. 啜 (slurp/drink) sounds like 說 (praise). Mocking someone who praises their own work.

客家汉字: 火燒竹筒——直爆
Hakka Pronunciation: fo3 sau1 zuk5 tung2 – cit6 bau4
Chinese definition: “爆”與報同音。直報是直接把事情說去，不作隱瞞。
English Definition: Bamboo burning in fire – it bursts straight open. 爆 (burst) sounds like 報 (report). Means to report or confess directly without hiding anything.

客家汉字: 狗徑索——食唔切
Hakka Pronunciation: geu3 gang4 sok5 – sit6 m ciet5
Chinese definition: 用來比喻太多宴會或者食物吃不完的意思。請看“狗徑索”典故。
English Definition: The dog trail rope – can't eat fast enough. Metaphor for having so many banquets or so much food that you can't keep up. See the legend of 狗徑索.

客家汉字: 雞屙尿——冇見過
Hakka Pronunciation: gai1 o1 ngiau4 –mau2 gien4 go4
Chinese definition: 雞是鳥類，不會排洩液體的尿。所以雞排洩尿液是“沒見過”的意思。
English Definition: A chicken urinating – never seen before! (Birds don't urinate as liquid.) Means something unbelievable or unprecedented.

客家汉字: 狗吠雷公——唔知天性
Hakka Pronunciation: geu3 poi4 lui2 gung1 – m di1 tien1 sin4
Chinese definition: 狗不知道雷公是屬於天上的神，於是冒犯亂吠，比喻因為無知而冒犯人。但“唔知天性”也指（尤其是小孩）不懂事。
English Definition: A dog barking at the thunder god – doesn't know its place. The dog doesn't know the thunder god belongs to heaven. Means being ignorant and recklessly offending others. Also: (especially of children) not knowing any better.

客家汉字: 狗食糯米——冇得變
Hakka Pronunciation: geu3 sit6 lo4 mi3 –mau2 det5 bien4
Chinese definition: 狗不能消化糯米，所以照原來的樣子排洩出來。比喻食古不化。
English Definition: A dog eating glutinous rice – no change possible (dogs can't digest it, so it passes through unchanged). Means inflexible and set in one's ways; unable to change.

客家汉字: 肋坼下毛——冇剃過（冇太過）
Hakka Pronunciation: lak6 cak5 ha1 mau1–mau2 tai4 go4
Chinese definition: 肋坼下，腋下。以前人一般不剃腋下的毛。“剃”在客家話跟“太”同音，“冇太過”指很普通，沒什麼了不起。
English Definition: Armpit hair – never been shaved. In the past, people didn't shave their armpits. 剃 (shave) sounds like 太 (too/very). 冇太過 = nothing special; perfectly ordinary.

客家汉字: 老鼠跌落糠籮頭——一時歡喜一時愁
Hakka Pronunciation: lau4 cu3 diet5 lok6 hong1 lo2 teu2 – yit5 si2 fon1 hi3 yit5 si2 seu2
Chinese definition: 老鼠以為糠籮裝的是稻穀，掉進去的時候非常開心。但發現裏面的全是鬆散而不好吃的米糠以後，發現很難脫身，就開始發愁了。
English Definition: A mouse falls into a basket of rice bran. First it is overjoyed (thinking it's grain), then it is dismayed (realising it's just bran and it can't escape). Sudden joy followed by sudden disappointment.

客家汉字: 痳瘋擎遮——做好人
Hakka Pronunciation: ma2 fung1 kia2 za1 – zo4 hau3 ngin2
Chinese definition: 痳瘋病人用傘遮住自己，讓人不知道他發病。比喻一些人犯了錯又“裝好人”。
English Definition: A leprosy patient holds up an umbrella to hide their condition – pretending to be a good person. Covers up wrongdoing while acting virtuous.

客家汉字: 冇芽芋種——凈愛來食
Hakka Pronunciation: mau2 nga2 vu4 zung3 – ciang4 oi4 loi2 sit6
Chinese definition: 芋頭當然沒有芽不能做種，只能要來做菜。但“凈愛來食”有歧義，可以罵人只會吃不幹活。
English Definition: Taro with no sprouts can't be used as seed, only as food. Can only eat, not contribute. Also used to mock someone as greedy and lazy.

客家汉字: 貓扡糍粑——唔得㪐爪
Hakka Pronunciation: miau4 ya3 ci2 ba1 – m det5 lot5 zau3
Chinese definition: 糍粑是用糯米製造的節日食品，客家常見。貓抓到糍粑當然很難脫身。但“唔得脫爪”有引申義，就是惹了麻煩、官非等很難脫身。
English Definition: A cat clutching a sticky rice cake – it can't let go of its claws. Getting entangled in trouble (lawsuits, problems) that you can't escape.

客家汉字: 五腳凳——斣多
Hakka Pronunciation: ng3 giok5 den4 – deu4 do1
Chinese definition: 客家話“裝”叫做“斣”。凳子四隻腳就夠，五隻當然是多裝了。但“斣多”又指隨便、不經意。
English Definition: A five-legged stool – one leg too many. Over-equipped; overdoing things. 斣多 also means casual or unintentional.

客家汉字: 石灰敥路——白行
Hakka Pronunciation: sak6 foi1 yam4 lu4 – pak6 hang2
Chinese definition: “敥”是撒放的意思。“白行”是白走一趟的意思。
English Definition: Spreading lime on the road – walked in vain. Making a wasted trip; getting nothing for your effort.

客家汉字: 山豬打交——使嘴
Hakka Pronunciation: san1 zu1 da3 gau1 – su3 zui3
Chinese definition: 字面是“使用嘴巴”，但也指使喚別人幹活的意思。請看“山豬打交”典故。
English Definition: Wild boars fighting – using their snouts. Lit. 'use the mouth'; also means bossing others around without doing anything yourself.

客家汉字: 食豬嫲肉——使暗力
Hakka Pronunciation: sit6 zu1 ma2 ngiuk5 – su3 am4 lit6
Chinese definition: 字面是吃母豬肉。因為母豬一般都養了好幾年，肉特別韌，所以要出暗力。
English Definition: Eating old sow meat – you need hidden force. Old sow meat is very tough; it takes great effort behind the scenes.

客家汉字: 田唇䃗——唔係路
Hakka Pronunciation: tien2 sun2 bok5 – m he4 lu4
Chinese definition: 田唇䃗是田壟，非常狹小，不是用來當道路用的，所以“唔係路”。但“唔係路”也有不像話、不對頭的意思。
English Definition: A field ridge – not a proper road. Lit. meaning: it's not a road. Fig. meaning: something is inappropriate or not right; this isn't the way.

客家汉字: 一隻雞閹嗨三隻核——冇心冇性
Hakka Pronunciation: yit5 zak5 gai1 yam1 hoi1 sam1 zak5 hak6 – mau2 sim1 mau2 siang4
Chinese definition: 核(hàk)是睪丸，一隻公雞只有兩顆。一隻雞閹了三個睪丸，就是心臟也給掏走了，所以就沒有心情（冇心性）了。
English Definition: A chicken castrated of three testicles (including its heart) – no heart and no spirit. Describes someone who is listless, unmotivated, and apathetic.

客家汉字: 灶下雞——出到門背唔曉啼
Hakka Pronunciation: zau4 ha1 gai1 – cut5 dau4 mun2 boi4 m hiau3 tai2
Chinese definition: 養在廚房的雞沒有到過外面，到外面就連開腔都不行了。比喻沒有膽量到外面去闖的人。 【21】歇後語 二維碼21
English Definition: A kitchen chicken – can't crow once it's outside the door. Describes a timid person who can't function in the outside world. (Variant of earlier entry.)

客家汉字: 哎條魚走，哎條魚大
Hakka Pronunciation: ai4 tiau2 ng zeu3, ai4 tiau4 ng tai4
Chinese definition: 抓不住的機會往往值得懷念。
English Definition: The fish you can't catch is always the biggest. What you can't have always seems more attractive.

客家汉字: 畚箕笠，畚箕摜
Hakka Pronunciation: bun4 gi1 lap5, bun4 gi1 kan4
Chinese definition: 罵女孩的話，該死的意思。因為以前有人殺死女嬰後用畚箕裝着去丟棄。
English Definition: Dustpan hat, dustpan wrapper. A death curse for girls (畚箕 was historically used to dispose of female infants); now generally a curse.

客家汉字: 春寒雨起，夏寒絕雨
Hakka Pronunciation: cun1 hon2 yi3 hi3, ha4 hon2 ciet6 yi3
Chinese definition: 春天變寒冷會下雨，夏天變涼就沒雨。
English Definition: Cold in spring brings rain; cold in summer stops rain. A weather proverb.

客家汉字: 打唔死，煠唔爛
Hakka Pronunciation: da3 m si3, sap6 m lan4
Chinese definition: 比喻人性格非常頑固。
English Definition: Can't be beaten to death; can't be boiled to mush. Describes an extremely stubborn, indestructible personality.

客家汉字: 打屁唔承，惹㜆佮人
Hakka Pronunciation: da3 pi4 m sin2, ngia1 mi1 gap5 ngin2
Chinese definition: 不承認放屁的人，母親是偷漢的。用來逼人承認自己放屁。
English Definition: Denying a fart means your mother slept around. A rhyme used to force someone to admit to farting.

客家汉字: 當時燒香，當時保佑
Hakka Pronunciation: dong1 si2 sau1 hiong1, dong1 si2 bau3 yiu4
Chinese definition: 比喻效果短暫。
English Definition: Burn incense now, get blessed now. The effects are temporary and short-lived.

客家汉字: 隔夜茶，毒過蛇
Hakka Pronunciation: gak5 ya4 ca2, tuk6 go4 sa2
Chinese definition: 放過夜的茶對身體有害（最近也受到科學證實）。
English Definition: Overnight tea is more poisonous than a snake. Folk wisdom: stale overnight tea is unhealthy (now somewhat supported by science).

客家汉字: 好做唔做，年三十晚賣灶疏
Hakka Pronunciation: hau3 zo4 m zo4, ngien2 sam1 sip5 man1 mai4 zau4 so4
Chinese definition: 民間信仰認為灶君農曆十二月二十四日升天，年初四才回來。灶疏是燒給灶君的，但年三十晚灶君不在，就沒人買了。比喻做多餘的事情。
English Definition: Not doing the right thing at the right time – like selling offerings for the Kitchen God on New Year's Eve when he's already gone to heaven. Doing something pointless at the wrong time.

客家汉字: 學勤三年，學懶三朝
Hakka Pronunciation: hok6 kiun2 sam1 ngien2, hok6 lan1 sam1 zau1
Chinese definition: 要懶惰容易，學勤勞很難。
English Definition: Three years to learn diligence; three mornings to learn laziness. Bad habits come easily; good ones take years.

客家汉字: 看貓嫲，捉貓仔
Hakka Pronunciation: kon4 miau4 ma2, zuk5 miau4 zai3
Chinese definition: 孩子都是像父母的。
English Definition: Look at the mother cat; that's how you predict the kittens. Like mother, like child.

客家汉字: 空手捉鳥，唔死都翹
Hakka Pronunciation: kong1 siu3 zuk5 diau1, m si3 du1 kiau1
Chinese definition: 空手捉鳥，鳥給人捉到會拼命掙扎，到最後很多時候是死掉的。
English Definition: Catching a bird with bare hands – even if it doesn't die, it'll be mortally wounded. Reckless actions lead to dire consequences.

客家汉字: 來也不除，唔來也不請
Hakka Pronunciation: loi2 ya1 but5 cu2, m loi2 ya1 but5 ciang3
Chinese definition: 來不來聽隨尊便。
English Definition: If you come, don't stand on ceremony; if you don't come, you won't be invited. A relaxed, open-door attitude.

客家汉字: 冇戴笠，冇戴帽
Hakka Pronunciation: mau2 dai4 lip5, mau2 dai4 mau4
Chinese definition: 頭上沒有戴任何東西來遮雨或者太陽。
English Definition: No bamboo hat, no cap. Nothing on the head for sun or rain; completely unprotected.

客家汉字: 冇惹公，尋惹公
Hakka Pronunciation: mau2 ngia1 gung1, cim2 ngia1 gung1
Chinese definition: 你爺爺已經不在了，你卻偏去找。。意思是無理取鬧。
English Definition: Your grandfather is already gone, yet you go looking for him. Making trouble for no reason; stirring up unnecessary conflicts.

客家汉字: 眼唔見，肚唔問
Hakka Pronunciation: ngan3 m gien4, du3 m mun4
Chinese definition: 很多食物的製作過程都很髒，眼不見為乾淨。
English Definition: What the eye doesn't see, the stomach doesn't question. Ignorance is bliss; food is made in dirty ways, so it's better not to watch.

客家汉字: 年三夜四，賊佬打屁
Hakka Pronunciation: ngien2 sam2 ya4 si4, cet6 lau3 da3 pi4
Chinese definition: 年關將至，盜賊猖獗，可能就在你身邊，連他們放屁都聽得見。
English Definition: Around the New Year, thieves are everywhere – close enough that you can hear them fart. Describes the season when thieves are rampant.

客家汉字: 入年架，講好話
Hakka Pronunciation: ngip6 ngien2 ga4, gong3 hau3 va4
Chinese definition: 年架是臘月廿四到正月十五期間，洋溢着過年的氣氛，要說吉祥的話。
English Definition: During the New Year period (腊月廿四 to 正月十五), only say auspicious words. A seasonal reminder to be positive.

客家汉字: 牛嫲打交，牛仔食草
Hakka Pronunciation: ngiu2 ma2 da3 gau1, ngiu2 zai3 sit6 cau3
Chinese definition: 上一代的恩怨不會影響下一代。
English Definition: While the cows fight, the calves eat grass. The next generation is not affected by the feuds of the previous one.

客家汉字: 白蟻齧，白蟻蛀
Hakka Pronunciation: pak6 li1 ngat5, pak6 li1 zu4
Chinese definition: 罵老人的話，說他們快鑽進棺材給白蟻咬。
English Definition: Gnawed by termites, bored by termites. A curse telling old people to hurry up and die.

客家汉字: 石禾庭，鐵跒把
Hakka Pronunciation: sak6 vo2 tang2, tiet5 kia4 ba3
Chinese definition: （比喻夫妻）倆的命硬鬥硬。
English Definition: Stone threshing floor, iron door handle. Describes a couple whose stubbornness clashes against each other.

客家汉字: 山光石㪐，人老病出
Hakka Pronunciation: san1 gong1 sak6 lut5, ngin2 lau3 piang4 cut5
Chinese definition: 人老就會體弱多病。
English Definition: As mountains bare their rocks, aging brings illness. Old age inevitably brings health problems.

客家汉字: 小暑大暑，有食懶煮
Hakka Pronunciation: siau3 cu3 tai4 cu3, yiu1 sit6 lan1 zu3
Chinese definition: 小暑大暑都在陽曆七月，是一年之中最熱的時候，沒有食慾。
English Definition: During Minor Heat and Major Heat (July), it's so hot you're too lazy to cook even when there's food. The hottest season.

客家汉字: 小雪大雪，煮飯唔切
Hakka Pronunciation: siau3 siet5 tai4 siet5, zu3 fan4 m ciet5
Chinese definition: 小雪大雪都在陽曆十二月，是一年之中日照最短的。過去沒有時鐘，看日出日落來煮飯，之間相隔時間很短。
English Definition: During Minor Snow and Major Snow (December), there's barely time to cook rice. The shortest days of the year.

客家汉字: 食茶甜，食飯香
Hakka Pronunciation: sit6 ca2 tiam2, sit6 fan4 hiong1
Chinese definition: 希望小孩不生病，順利長大。
English Definition: May your tea be sweet and your rice fragrant. A blessing wishing a child good health and happiness.

客家汉字: 食唔完，使唔盡
Hakka Pronunciation: sit6 m yen2, su3 m cin4
Chinese definition: 錢多得怎樣也花不完，不愁吃不愁穿。
English Definition: Eating without running out; spending without running dry. A wish for endless abundance.

客家汉字: 手摎腳等，腳摎泥打等
Hakka Pronunciation: siu3 lau1 giok5 den1, giok5 lau1 lai2 da3 den1
Chinese definition: 手腳不靈活。泥打是以前的一種建築工具，形狀像腳。
English Definition: Hand waits for foot; foot waits for a wooden mallet. Clumsy and uncoordinated; slow and awkward.

客家汉字: 手盤係肉，手背也係肉
Hakka Pronunciation: siu3 pan2 he4 ngiuk5, siu3 boi4 ya1 he4 ngiuk5
Chinese definition: 手心手背都是肉。比喻兩邊都偏袒不來。
English Definition: The palm is flesh; the back of the hand is also flesh. Unable to choose between two equally loved ones; having to be fair to all.

客家汉字: 貪條草食，跌死條牛
Hakka Pronunciation: tam1 tiau2 cau3 sit6, diet5 si3 tiau2 ngiu2
Chinese definition: 因小失大。
English Definition: Greedily reaching for one blade of grass, the ox falls to its death. Losing something big for something small; penny wise, pound foolish.

客家汉字: 豆腐係水，閻王係鬼
Hakka Pronunciation: teu4 fu4 he4 sui3, yam2 vong2 he4 gui3
Chinese definition: 凡事均不會離開它們的本質。
English Definition: Tofu is water; the King of Hell is a ghost. Things cannot escape their fundamental nature.

客家汉字: 頭紅花赤，有一隻食一隻
Hakka Pronunciation: teu2 fung2 fa1 cak5, yiu1 yit5 zak5 sit6 yit5 zak5
Chinese definition: 罵人不懂得計劃將來，又作“老鼠不留隔夜糧”。
English Definition: Bright red all over – eat whatever comes along. Mocking people who spend everything they earn without saving for the future.

客家汉字: 天放黃，大水浸眠床
Hakka Pronunciation: tien1 fong4 vong2, tai4 sui3 zim4 min2 cong2
Chinese definition: 日落以後如果天上泛起黃色的霞光，過幾天就會下大暴雨。
English Definition: When the sky turns yellow at sunset, flooding will reach the beds. A weather sign predicting heavy rainfall.

客家汉字: 獨柴難燒，獨子難教
Hakka Pronunciation: tuk6 cai2 lan2 sau1, tuk6 zu3 lan2 gau1
Chinese definition: 獨子因為沒有兄弟姊妹，不容易教養。
English Definition: A single stick of wood is hard to burn; an only child is hard to raise. Upbringing requires multiple influences.

客家汉字: 烏蠅摟，烏蠅囓
Hakka Pronunciation: vu1 yin2 leu1, vu1 yin2 ngat5
Chinese definition: 被蒼蠅圍繞叮咬
English Definition: Swarmed by flies and bitten by flies. Being plagued by flies.

客家汉字: 有錯子，冇錯孫
Hakka Pronunciation: yiu1 co4 zu3, mau2 co4 sun1
Chinese definition: 被人收養的孩子，如果在結婚前改回原來的姓氏是可以的，但如果養子生了孩子，孫子則不可以改回原來的姓氏了。
English Definition: An adopted child can reclaim their original surname before marriage, but the grandchildren cannot. The rules of adoption and lineage.

客家汉字: 若愛甜，先放鹽
Hakka Pronunciation: yok6 oi4 tiam2, sien1 fong4 yam2
Chinese definition: 煮菜要放鹽才有味道。
English Definition: If you want sweet, first add salt. A cooking paradox: salt enhances sweetness.

客家汉字: 早就來坐，暗就來摸
Hakka Pronunciation: zau3 ciu4 loi2 co1, am4 ciu4 loi2 mo1
Chinese definition: 時間管理不善，白天沒做好事情，到了晚上才認真工作。
English Definition: Come to sit during the day; come to grope in the dark at night. Poor time management: doing important things after dark when it should be done in daylight.

客家汉字: 蒸春煠茄，毒過後來婆
Hakka Pronunciation: zin1 cun1 sap6 kio2, tuk6 go4 heu4 loi2 po2
Chinese definition: 民間認為蒸雞蛋和水煮茄子會很“毒”，會觸發傷口發炎甚至潰瘍。
English Definition: Steamed eggs and boiled eggplant are more toxic than a stepmother. Folk belief that these foods aggravate wounds and cause inflammation.

客家汉字: 進豬貧，進狗富
Hakka Pronunciation: zin4 zu1 pin2, zin4 geu3 fu4
Chinese definition: 民間迷信，認為自來豬是不吉利的，會帶來貧窮。自來狗則會帶來財富。
English Definition: A stray pig brings poverty; a stray dog brings wealth. Folk superstition.

客家汉字: 做鹽唔鹹，做醋唔酸
Hakka Pronunciation: zo4 yam2 m ham2, zo4 cu4 m son1
Chinese definition: 比喻一事無成。 【17】五字以上兩句，首句三到四個字 二維碼17
English Definition: Making salt that's not salty; making vinegar that's not sour. Accomplishing nothing; failing at everything you attempt.

客家汉字: 出門冇老大，包尾食飽撿碗筷
Hakka Pronunciation: cut5 mun2 mau2 lau3 tai4, bau1 mui1 sit6 bau3 giam3 von3 kai4
Chinese definition: 不管是誰，最後吃飽的要收拾碗筷。
English Definition: Whoever finishes eating last must collect the bowls and chopsticks. No special seniority once outside the home.

客家汉字: 狐狸莫罵貓，罵到狐狸呀呀叫
Hakka Pronunciation: fu2 li2 mok6 ma4 miau4, ma4 dau3 fu2 li2 nga3 nga3 giau4
Chinese definition: 自己也有類似的缺點卻還去罵人。
English Definition: Don't let the fox mock the cat – the fox will end up shrieking too. Those who have similar faults shouldn't criticize others.

客家汉字: 腳趾長過公，唔死一世窮
Hakka Pronunciation: giok5 zi3 cong2 go4 gung1, m si3 yit5 se4 kiung2
Chinese definition: 迷信說法，沒有科學根據。
English Definition: Toes longer than the big toe – destined for lifelong poverty. A folk superstition with no scientific basis.

客家汉字: 好心冇好報，好柴燒爛灶
Hakka Pronunciation: hau3 sim1 mau2 hau3 bau4, hau3 cai2 sau1 lan4 zau4
Chinese definition: 慨歎好心人往往得不到好報。
English Definition: Good intentions bring no reward – good firewood just burns the bad stove. A lament that virtuous people often suffer.

客家汉字: 係蛇一身冷，係狼一身腥
Hakka Pronunciation: he4 sa2 yit5 sin1 lang1, he4 long2 yit5 sin1 siang1
Chinese definition: 事物的本質不會變。
English Definition: A snake is cold all over; a wolf smells all over. Things cannot change their fundamental nature.

客家汉字: 泥蛇一畚箕，唔當田棍蛇一條
Hakka Pronunciation: lai2 sa2 yit5 bun4 gi1, m dong4 tien2 gun4 sa2 yit5 tiau2
Chinese definition: 貴精不貴多。也可以把“田棍蛇”說成“青竹蛇”。
English Definition: A basket of mud snakes doesn't equal one field-bamboo snake. Quality beats quantity.

客家汉字: 懶人多屎尿，唔推冇得料
Hakka Pronunciation: lan1 ngin2 do1 si3 ngiau4, m toi1 mau2 det5 liau4
Chinese definition: 懶惰的人往往用上廁所為藉口偷懶。
English Definition: Lazy people always need to use the bathroom. Lazy people use toilet trips as an excuse to avoid work.

客家汉字: 懶人有懶命，鑊頭唔洗狗舐凈
Hakka Pronunciation: lan1 ngin2 yiu1 lan1 miang4, vok6 teu2 m se3 geu3 se1 ciang4
Chinese definition: 懶惰的人往往得到上天的眷顧。
English Definition: Lazy people have lucky lives – the unwashed pot gets licked clean by the dog. The lazy sometimes end up better off.

客家汉字: 蟻子食一千，烏蠅唔好食半邊
Hakka Pronunciation: li1 zu3 sit6 yit5 cien1, vu1 yin2 m hau3 sit6 ban4 bien1
Chinese definition: 螞蟻通常不帶軍（菌），吃了沒怎樣，可是吃了蒼蠅麻煩就大了。
English Definition: Ants eat a thousand without harming you; even half a fly is dangerous. Ants don't carry germs; flies do.

客家汉字: 唔怕落霜天，緊惶烏黷愁
Hakka Pronunciation: m pa4 lok6 song1 tien1, gin3 kong2 vu1 du4 seu2
Chinese definition: 有霜的天氣通常是晴天，早上雖然冷但中午會暖和。但陰冷的天氣卻更難受。
English Definition: Not afraid of frosty days; more worried about grey overcast days. Frost means clear skies; grey cold is more unpleasant.

客家汉字: 人情緊過債，鑊頭拿去賣
Hakka Pronunciation: ngin2 cin2 gin3 go4 zai4, vok6 teu2 la1 hi4 mai4
Chinese definition: 比喻拿紅包做人情很重要。
English Definition: Social obligations are tighter than debt – the pot can be sold to fulfil them. Gift-giving obligations are more binding than financial ones.

客家汉字: 人多好做事，人少好做年
Hakka Pronunciation: ngin2 do1 hau3 zo4 su4, ngin2 sau3 hau3 zo4 ngien2
Chinese definition: 幹活人多比較好，過年人少就省事兒。
English Definition: Many people are good for work; few people are good for New Year. Large group for labor; small group for celebrations.

客家汉字: 人冇千日好，花冇百日紅
Hakka Pronunciation: ngin2 mau2 cien1 ngit5 hau3. fa1 mau2 bak5 ngit5 fung2
Chinese definition: 人總會隔一些時間就生病。
English Definition: No person is healthy for a thousand days; no flower blooms for a hundred. Everyone gets sick eventually.

客家汉字: 人愛人打落，火愛人歕著
Hakka Pronunciation: ngin2 oi4 ngin2 da3 lok6, fo3 oi4 ngin2 pun2 cok6
Chinese definition: 打落就是看扁。被看扁就會有上進心，好比火要用力吹才會著。
English Definition: People need to be challenged; fire needs to be blown. Being underestimated motivates people to rise.

客家汉字: 山精唔識寶，蘇木袞來做柴燒
Hakka Pronunciation: san1 zin1 m sit5 bau3, su1 muk5 gun3 loi2 zo4 cai2 sau1
Chinese definition: 山精，沒見過世面、沒知識的人。蘇木是貴重的材料。比喻不懂得珍惜好東西。
English Definition: An ignorant mountain folk uses precious sappan wood as firewood. Those without knowledge don't appreciate valuable things.

客家汉字: 食飯打赤膊，做事尋衫着
Hakka Pronunciation: sit6 fan4 da3 cak5 bok5, zo4 se4 cim2 sam1 zok5
Chinese definition: 嘲笑人只會吃飯不會幹活。
English Definition: Bare-chested for eating; putting on a shirt only for work. Mocking those who eat enthusiastically but work unwillingly.

客家汉字: 食齋會變仙，牛馬上西天
Hakka Pronunciation: sit6 zai1 voi4 bien4 sien1, ngiu2 ma1 song1 si1 tien1
Chinese definition: 只靠吃齋修行來改變命運是不夠的。
English Definition: Eating vegetarian alone won't make you immortal – oxen and horses go to heaven too. Superficial virtue is not enough.

客家汉字: 糶榖買番薯，曉算唔曉除
Hakka Pronunciation: tiau4 guk5 mai1 fan1 su2, hiau3 son4 m hiau3 cu2
Chinese definition: 以為自己聰明，把米賣掉來買紅薯。
English Definition: Selling rice to buy sweet potatoes, thinking you're clever. Being clever by half; a foolish trade.

客家汉字: 天起狐狸斑，曬穀唔使翻
Hakka Pronunciation: tien1 hi3 fu2 li2 ban1, sai4 guk5 m su3 fan1
Chinese definition: 天上出現狐狸斑一樣的高積雲，連續幾天會天晴。
English Definition: When altocumulus clouds appear in the sky, fine weather will last several days. No need to turn the grain drying in the sun.

客家汉字: 獨貓掌穀倉，獨狗掌庵堂
Hakka Pronunciation: tuk6 miau4 zong3 guk5 cong1, tuk6 geu3 zong3 am1 tong2
Chinese definition: “獨”是指沒兄弟姊妹的動物。客家人相信獨貓特別好，獨狗就不太吉利了。
English Definition: An only cat guards the granary well; an only dog guarding the temple is unlucky. Hakka folk belief about only-animal superstitions.

客家汉字: 烏龜莫笑鼈，大家泥裏穴
Hakka Pronunciation: vu1 gui1 mok6 siau4 biet5, tai4 ga1 lai2 li1 hiet6
Chinese definition: 既然大家是同類就不要互相嘲笑。
English Definition: Don't let the turtle mock the softshell turtle – both live in mud. Don't mock others who are in the same situation as you.

客家汉字: 閻王唔在家，鬼仔打翻車
Hakka Pronunciation: yam2 vong2 m coi1 ka1, gui3 zai3 da3 fan1 ca1
Chinese definition: 比喻大人離家以後，小孩子在家裏亂玩。
English Definition: When the King of Hell is away, the little ghosts overturn carts. When the boss is away, subordinates run wild.

客家汉字: 一日打喇赤，三日尋火炙
Hakka Pronunciation: yit5 ngit5 da3 lak5 cak5, sam1 ngit5 cim2 fo3 zak5
Chinese definition: 打喇赤，打赤膊。冬天裏如果有一天特別溫暖，便是變天的前奏。接着的幾天一定很冷。
English Definition: One warm day in winter means several cold days to follow. A warm spell in winter is a sign of approaching cold.

客家汉字: 一日閹九豬，九日冇豬閹
Hakka Pronunciation: yit5 ngit5 yam1 giu3 zu1, giu3 ngit5 mau2 zu1 yam1
Chinese definition: 一曝十寒。
English Definition: Castrate nine pigs in one day, then nine days with no pigs to castrate. One intense burst of work followed by a long idle period; feast or famine.

客家汉字: 一夜冇睡目，十夜補唔足
Hakka Pronunciation: yit5 ya4 mau2 soi4 muk5, sip6 ya4 bu3 m zuk5
Chinese definition: 一晚不睡覺，十晚補不來。
English Definition: One sleepless night; ten nights cannot make it up. Sleep debt accumulates and cannot be easily repaid.

客家汉字: 有肉嫌有毛，有酒嫌冇糟
Hakka Pronunciation: yiu1 ngiuk5 hiam2 yiu1 mau1, yiu1 ziu3 hiam2 mau2 zau1
Chinese definition: 比喻人貪心，想得寸進尺。
English Definition: Complain that meat has fur; complain that wine has no lees. Never satisfied; always finding fault.

客家汉字: 左手左泥跛，右手發跛蹄
Hakka Pronunciation: zo3 siu3 zo3 lai2 bai1, yiu4 siu3 bot5 bai1 tai2
Chinese definition: 嘲笑左撇子。
English Definition: Left hand causes a limp on the left; right hand causes a stumble. Mocking left-handed people.

客家汉字: 阿斗官食牙蕉皮，食一時得一時
Hakka Pronunciation: a1 deu3 gon1 sit6 nga2 ziau1 pi2, sit6 yit5 si2 det5 yit5 si2
Chinese definition: 相傳阿斗官是個富家子弟，後來家道中落要吃蕉皮充飢，比喻環境變差就得要適應一下。
English Definition: The young master Ah Dou, fallen on hard times, had to eat banana peels to survive. Adapt to circumstances; make do with what you have at any given time.

客家汉字: 朝上無人莫做官，廚下無人莫去鑚
Hakka Pronunciation: cau2 song4 mau2 ngin2 mok6 zo4 gon1, cu4 ha4 mau2 ngin2 mok6 hi4 zon1
Chinese definition: 沒有熟人哪裏都不行。
English Definition: Without connections at court, don't seek an official post; without knowing the cook, don't try to get into the kitchen. Connections are everything.

客家汉字: 千揀萬揀揀隻爛燈盞，千擇萬擇擇隻爛飯勺
Hakka Pronunciation: cien1 gan3 man4 gan3 gan3 zak5 lan4 den1 zan3, cien1 tok6 man4 tok6 tok6 zak5 lan4 fan4 sok6
Chinese definition: （指找對象）選擇了千遍萬遍，到頭來找到的還是很差勁的。
English Definition: After a thousand choosings, you still end up with a broken lamp. After all that deliberation, the result is still poor.

客家汉字: 醜人自有醜人愛，爛鑊自有爛鑊蓋
Hakka Pronunciation: ciu3 ngin2 zu4 yiu1 ciu4 ngin2 oi4, lan4 vok6 zu4 yiu1 lan4 vok6 goi4
Chinese definition: 安慰人無論怎樣醜都會找到結婚對象。
English Definition: Even the ugly will find love; even a broken wok has a lid to fit it. Everyone finds their match; don't despair.

客家汉字: 多啜婦娘多大舅，多啜男人多朋友
Hakka Pronunciation: do1 zoi4 bu1 ngiong2 do1 tai4 kiu1, do1 zoi4 lam2 ngin2 do1 pen2 yiu1
Chinese definition: 愛說話的人往往很多朋友。
English Definition: A talkative woman gains many brothers-in-law; a talkative man gains many friends. Talkers build wide social networks.

客家汉字: 打銅鑼手又攰，燒紙寶面又烏
Hakka Pronunciation: da3 tung2 lo2 siu3 yiu4 kioi4, sau1 zi3 bau3 mien4 yiu4 vu1
Chinese definition: 在慶典上幫忙打鑼或者燒紙錢哪都不行。比喻一事無成。
English Definition: Beating the gong makes your hands tired; burning paper money makes your face black. Doing two thankless tasks and getting nothing from either.

客家汉字: 冬至唔過唔寒，夏至唔過唔暖
Hakka Pronunciation: dung1 zi4 m go4 m hon2, ha4 zi4 m go4 m lon1
Chinese definition: 農諺。夏天過了夏至才開始熱，冬天過了冬至才會冷。
English Definition: Cold only after Winter Solstice; warm only after Summer Solstice. A seasonal proverb.

客家汉字: 狐狸唔知尾下臭，田螺唔知屎窟皺
Hakka Pronunciation: fu2 li2 m di1 mui1 ha1 ciu4, tien2 lo2 m di1 si3 fut5 ziu4
Chinese definition: 比喻人往往自己不知道自己的缺點。
English Definition: A fox doesn't know its tail smells; a river snail doesn't know its own backside is wrinkled. People are blind to their own faults.

客家汉字: 緊倚勢哎管鼻，撿到來餓絕氣
Hakka Pronunciation: gin3 yi3 si4 ai4 gon3 pi4, giam3 dau3 loi2 ngo4 ciet6 hi4
Chinese definition: 以為自己有些優點，怎知道光依靠它是活不了的。
English Definition: The more you rely on your nose, the more likely it is to starve to death. Over-relying on any single advantage will lead to ruin.

客家汉字: 看人做油煎煎，自家做臭火煙
Hakka Pronunciation: kon4 ngin2 zo4 yiu2 zien1 zien1, ci2 ga1 zo4 ciu4 fo4 yen1
Chinese definition: 看別人做得容易，自己做起來卻不行。
English Definition: Watching others cook it looks easy; doing it yourself produces only smoke and a bad smell. Things look easy until you try them yourself.

客家汉字: 爛畚箕打湖鰍，走嘅走溜嘅溜
Hakka Pronunciation: lan4 bun4 gi1 da4 fu2 ciu1, zeu3 e4 zeu3 liu1 e4 liu1
Chinese definition: 比喻各散東西。
English Definition: A rotten dustpan used to catch loaches – some escape, some slip away. Things scatter in all directions.

客家汉字: 老婆就心肝命袋，阿㜆就臭風鹹菜
Hakka Pronunciation: lau3 po2 ciu4 sim1 gon1 miang4 toi4, a1 mi1 ciu4 ciu4 fung1 ham2 coi4
Chinese definition: 心肝命袋，即心肝寶貝。鹹菜是農村生活的日常食品，可以存放一段日子，但太久會變壞會有一種特別的臭味，客家話叫做臭風。整句話指兒子婚後只疼愛老婆，不理母親。
English Definition: A wife is treasured like a precious jewel; a mother is treated like stale pickled vegetables. Describes a son who values his wife over his mother.

客家汉字: 吂曾落水先唱歌，有落都唔多
Hakka Pronunciation: man2 cen2 lok6 sui3 sien1 cong4 go1, yiu1 lok6 du1 m do1
Chinese definition: 下雨前雷聲大，下雨不多。
English Definition: Singing before the rain falls means there won't be much rain. All bark and no bite; big noise before little action.

客家汉字: 冇油麻唔成茶，冇婦娘唔成家
Hakka Pronunciation: mau2 yiu1 ma2 m sang2 ca2, mau2 bu1 ngiong2 m sang2 ga1
Chinese definition: 擂茶必有芝麻，比喻女人是一個家庭不可或缺的部分。
English Definition: No sesame, no 擂茶 (Hakka ground tea); no woman, no home. Women are indispensable to the household.

客家汉字: 你唔嫌厓籮疏，厓唔嫌你米碎
Hakka Pronunciation: ngi2 m hiam2 ngai2 lo2 so1, ngai2 m hiam2 ngi2 mi3 sui4
Chinese definition: 謂夫妻之間不要互相嫌棄。
English Definition: You don't complain my basket is loose; I don't complain your rice is broken. Mutual tolerance between husband and wife.

客家汉字: 蛇爭蛇𧊅爭𧊅，蝦公爭老蟹
Hakka Pronunciation: sa2 zang1 sa2 gai3 zang1 gai3, ha2 gung1 zang1 lau4 hai3
Chinese definition: 人往往幫自己人說話。
English Definition: Snakes take the snake's side; frogs take the frog's side; shrimps side with old crabs. People naturally defend their own kind.

客家汉字: 生子唔得子時到，生女唔得午時來
Hakka Pronunciation: sang1 zu3 m det5 zu3 si2 dau4, sang1 ng3 m det5 ng3 si2 loi2
Chinese definition: 生兒子子時最好，女兒則在午時最理想。但這只是順口溜而已，沒有科學根據。
English Definition: For sons, the zi hour (midnight) is best; for daughters, the wu hour (noon) is best. A folk rhyme with no scientific basis.

客家汉字: 殺頭生理有人做，蝕本生理冇人做
Hakka Pronunciation: sat5 teu2 sen1 li1 yiu1 ngin2 zo4, set6 bun3 sen1 li1 mau2 ngin2 zo4
Chinese definition: 獲利豐厚的生意，哪怕是殺頭也有人做。虧本的就相反。
English Definition: Even a business that risks decapitation will find someone to do it if the profit is good; but no one does a loss-making business. People follow profit.

客家汉字: 心臼多懶洗碗，鴨嫲多懶生卵
Hakka Pronunciation: sim1 kiu1 do1 lan1 se4 von3, ap5 ma2 do1 lan1 sang1 lon3
Chinese definition: 幹活的人多，互相推搪。
English Definition: Too many daughters-in-law are lazy about washing dishes; too many duck hens lay fewer eggs. When there are too many hands, responsibility is diffused.

客家汉字: 食死老公拑凳板，餓死老婆磨爛席
Hakka Pronunciation: sit6 si3 lau3 gung1 kiam2 den4 ban3, ngo4 si4 lau3 po2 mo4 lan4 ciak6
Chinese definition: 女人太會吃，男人不會賺錢，家庭都會破裂。
English Definition: A wife who eats too much breaks the bench; a husband who earns nothing wears out the sleeping mat. Both excess and poverty destroy family life.

客家汉字: 食粥唔當食飯，炙火唔當踞炭
Hakka Pronunciation: sit6 zuk5 m dong4 sit6 fan4, zak5 fo3 m dong4 kiu2 tan4
Chinese definition: 簡單的道理誰都會。
English Definition: Congee isn't as filling as rice; warming by a fire isn't as good as sitting on charcoal. Common wisdom that everyone knows.

客家汉字: 爺娘記子長江水，子記爺娘冇擔竿長
Hakka Pronunciation: ya2 ngiong2 gi4 zu3 cong2 gong1 sui3, zu3 gi4 ya2 ngiong2 mau2 dam4 gon1 cong2
Chinese definition: 父母愛孩子，孩子卻不會長期記掛父母
English Definition: A parent's love for a child is as long as the Yangtze River; a child's memory of parents is shorter than a carrying pole. Parents love more than children return.

客家汉字: 養子唔知得娘辛苦，養女正曉得謝娘恩
Hakka Pronunciation: yong1 zu3 m di1 ngiong2 sin1 ku3, yong1 ng3 zang4 hiau3 det5 cia4 ngiong2 en1
Chinese definition: 只有女兒才知道母親的偉大。
English Definition: A son doesn't know how hard his mother worked; only a daughter truly appreciates a mother's love.

客家汉字: 羊有跪乳之恩，鴉有反哺之義
Hakka Pronunciation: yong2 yiu1 kui3 yui3 zu1 en1, a1 yiu1 fan3 pu3 zu1 ngi4
Chinese definition: 連動物也懂孝道，何況是人？
English Definition: A lamb kneels to nurse from its mother; a crow feeds its parents when old. Even animals know filial piety; how much more should humans.

客家汉字: 週身生成驢子形，一時唔做發頭暈
Hakka Pronunciation: ziu1 sin1 sang1 sin2 li2 zai3 hin2, yit1 si2 m zo4 bot5 teu2 vin2
Chinese definition: 渾身長得像驢子，不幹活就會生病 【19】五字以上兩句，首句六個字 二維碼19
English Definition: Built like a donkey all over; not working causes headaches. A hardworking person becomes ill if they stop working.

客家汉字: 半壁挽筲箕，年年兩夫妻，半壁挽銅鑼，年年兩公婆
Hakka Pronunciation: ban4 biak5 van3 sau1 gi1, ngien2 ngien2 liong3 fu1 ci1, ban4 biak5 van3 tung2 lo2, ngien2 ngien2 liong3 gung1 po2
Chinese definition: 嘲笑沒有生孩子的夫妻。
English Definition: A half-moon bamboo basket for just a couple year after year; a half-moon gong for just the two of them. A rhyme mocking childless couples.

客家汉字: 刺瓜老，好洗鑊，瓠瓜老，好做勺
Hakka Pronunciation: ci4 ga1 lau3, hau3 se3 vok6, pu2 ga1 lau3, hau3 zo4 sok6
Chinese definition: 農村生活很簡單——絲瓜老了曬乾用來洗鍋，瓠瓜老了曬乾用來做勺子。
English Definition: Old loofah is good for scrubbing woks; old bottle gourd is good for making ladles. Simple village life finds use for everything.

客家汉字: 多子多連牽，冇子成神仙，神仙跌落地冇人牽
Hakka Pronunciation: do1 zu3 do1 lien1 kien1, mau2 zu3 sang2 sin2 sien1, sin2 sien1 diet5 lok6 ti4 mau2 ngin2 kien1
Chinese definition: 多孩子的家庭很多麻煩的事，沒有孩子的夫妻很自由，但年老就無依靠。
English Definition: Many children bring many worries; no children is as free as an immortal; but an immortal who falls to earth has no one to help. Children are both a burden and a support.

客家汉字: 寧賣祖宗田，莫賣祖宗言；寧賣祖宗坑，莫賣祖宗聲。
Hakka Pronunciation: len2 mai4 zu3 zung1 tien2, mok6 mai4 zu3 zung1 ngien2; len2 mai4 zu3 zung1 hang1, mok6 mai4 zu3 zung1 sang1
Chinese definition: 強調要保護母語，比祖宗的田產還重要。
English Definition: Better to sell ancestral land than the ancestral language; better to sell ancestral plots than the ancestral sounds. Preserving the mother tongue is more important than material inheritance.

客家汉字: 人心節節高，井水變成酒，又嫌豬冇糟
Hakka Pronunciation: ngin2 sim1 ziet5 ziet5 gau1, ziang3 sui3 bien4 sang2 ziu3, yiu4 hiam2 zu1 mau2 zau1
Chinese definition: 這裏牽涉呂洞賓把水變成酒的傳說。比喻貪念永無止境。
English Definition: Human greed keeps growing. Even after well water was turned to wine (a legend), people complained there was no lees for the pigs. Greed has no limit.

客家汉字: 瓠打瓠，瓜打瓜，唔係像阿㜆就像阿爸$
Hakka Pronunciation: pu2 da3 pu2, ga1 da3 ga1, m he4 ciong4 a1 mi1 ciu4 ciong4 a1 ba1
Chinese definition: 孩子怎樣也像父母。類似北方話的“龍生龍鳳生鳳”。
English Definition: Gourd begets gourd; melon begets melon. Children always resemble either mother or father. Like the northern saying: 'dragons beget dragons, phoenixes beget phoenixes'.

客家汉字: 衰唔知，末唔知，鼻公發蟲恅過蘿蔔絲
Hakka Pronunciation: soi1 m di1, mat5 m di1, pi4 gung1 bot5 cung2 lau1 go4 lo2 pet6 si1
Chinese definition: 恅過，以為。嘲笑人不知道自己的短處還到處張揚。
English Definition: Doesn't know their own misfortune, yet thinks their nose is fancier than shredded radish. Obliviously and arrogantly boasting while being completely unaware of one's own deficiencies.

客家汉字: 讀書讀得少，袁字寫成表；讀書讀得多，料字寫成科。
Hakka Pronunciation: tuk6 su1 tuk6 det5 sau3, yen2 su4 sia3 sang2 biau3, tuk6 su1 tuk6 det5 do1, liau4 su4 sia3 sang2 ko1
Chinese definition: 嘲笑別人寫錯字。
English Definition: Too little education: writes 袁 as 表; too much book-learning: writes 料 as 科. Mocking those who make character errors at either extreme.

客家汉字: 禾鷝仔，啜嘩嘩，有啜話別人，冇啜話自家
Hakka Pronunciation: vo2 bit5 zai3, zoi4 va1 va1, yiu1 zoi4 va4 piet6 ngin2, mau2 zoi4 va4 ci2 ga1
Chinese definition: 罵人只會說別人，自己犯同樣毛病卻不說。
English Definition: The little noisy bird has plenty to say about others but nothing about itself. Mocking those who gossip about others but ignore their own faults.

客家汉字: 黃頭蛇，七姐妹，緊打緊多來
Hakka Pronunciation: vong2 teu2 sa2, cit5 zi3 moi4, gin3 da3 gin3 do1 loi2
Chinese definition: 黃頭蛇是南方田野間一種常見的無毒蛇。據說打死一條以後，同類會來增援，所以勸大家不要打。
English Definition: The yellow-headed snake comes in groups of seven. If you kill one, more will come as reinforcement. Don't stir up unnecessary trouble.

客家汉字: 黃腫大食懶，食飽就愛癱，食飽唔癱，黃腫曉番
Hakka Pronunciation: vong2 zung3 tai4 sit6 lan1, sit6 bau3 ciu4 oi4 tan1, sit6 bau3 m tan1, vong2 zung3 hiau3 fan1
Chinese definition: 罵人的話。黃腫是肝炎。罵人吃飽就睡，否則肝炎會復發。
English Definition: A curse: only eating and sleeping causes hepatitis. If you don't rest after eating, the jaundice will come back. A mock health warning.

客家汉字: 醫藥先生死婦娘，算命先生半路亡，地理先生冇屋床
Hakka Pronunciation: yi1 yok6 sin1 sang1 si3 bu1 ngiong2, son4 miang4 sin1 sang1 ban4 lu4 mong2, ti4 li1 sin1 sang1 mau2 vuk5 cong2
Chinese definition: 醫生會死老婆，算命的自己卻不知道自己死期，看風水的沒有房子（屋床是建房的地）。諷刺他們敵不過天意。
English Definition: The doctor's wife dies; the fortune-teller dies mid-journey; the geomancer has no house. None of them can apply their skills to save themselves from fate.

客家汉字: 一代親，二代表，三代閑了了
Hakka Pronunciation: yit5 toi4 cin1, ngi4 toi4 biau3, sam1 toi4 han2 liau3 liau3
Chinese definition: 第一代是姐妹，孩子是表親，第三代就沒親情了。
English Definition: First generation: sisters. Second generation: cousins. Third generation: strangers. Kinship fades with each passing generation.

客家汉字: 豬䂻大，狗䂻壞，人就䂻到礙礙曬曬
Hakka Pronunciation: zu1 cang4 tai4, geu3 cang4 fai4, ngin2 ciu4 cang4 dau3 ngai4 ngai4 sai4 sai4
Chinese definition: 豬拼命吃會長胖，狗拼命吃會生病，人拼命吃會很不舒服。 【20】三句或以上 二維碼20
English Definition: Pigs overeat and grow fat; dogs overeat and fall sick; humans overeat and become a nuisance to everyone. (Variant of 豬䂻大狗䂻壞人就䂻倒礙礙曬曬.)
